nasb.text: My heart was hot within me, While I was musing the fire burned; Then I spoke with my tongue:

esv.text: My heart became hot within me. As I mused, the fire burned; then I spoke with my tongue:

cnv.text: 我的心在我裡面發熱； 我默想的時候，心裡火燒； 我就用舌頭說話：

ccb.text: 我心如火烧，越沉思越烦躁， 便开口呼求：

csbs.text: 我的心在我里面灼热， 在我哀叹时如火中烧， 我就用舌头说话。
